text:
Title: Google AI Studio
URL: https://vertexaisearch.cloud.google.com/grounding-api-redirect/AUZIYQF8MxxmxdZWRUHpxjgpLwaYi2zntM9cIQalVme3uyJtSv03CCbNleJbTbKgh-bFWxW3x6cVKNrwmX0DEgNi0t6FW5IO59r8UBhZA81kNjFBOJOEKxpjDg==
Google AI Studio offers access to Gemini models, described as state-of-the-art for coding, reasoning, creative writing, and multimodal capabilities. It provides a unified AI playground to test prompts across various modalities, including text, image, audio, and video models. The platform aims to be the fastest way to build AI-first applications, allowing users to go from idea to app with the power of Gemini.
